command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.191 "sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/gitea.service > /dev/null << 'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Gitea
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=jose
Group=jose
WorkingDirectory=/home/jose/gitea
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/gitea web
Restart=always
RestartSec=3s
Environment=HOME=/home/jose USER=jose

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF
sudo systemctl daemon-reload && sudo systemctl enable gitea && echo enabled_ok"
